name: Cheddar-Onion Corn Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Lightly grease muffin tins.
2. In a large bowl, mix together flour, cornmeal, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
3. Add Cheddar cheese and minced onion; stir until well combined.
4. Add milk, melted butter, and lightly beaten eggs to the dry ingredients.
5. Mix just until the dry ingredients are moistened; do not overmix.
6. Spoon batter into prepared muffin tins, filling each about two-thirds full.
7. Bake in preheated oven for 30 to 40 minutes, or until puffed and golden.
8. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
